{| class="infobox"
! colspan="2" class="infobox-title" | {{{name}}}
{{#if:{{{aliases|}}}|
{{!}}-
{{!}} class="infobox-label" {{!}} Aliases
{{!}} class="infobox-data" {{!}} {{{aliases|}}}
}}
{{#if:{{{titles|}}}|
{{!}}-
{{!}} class="infobox-label" {{!}} Titles
{{!}} class="infobox-data" {{!}} {{{titles|}}}
}}
{{#if:{{{abilities|}}}|
{{!}}-
{{!}} class="infobox-label" {{!}} Abilities
{{!}} class="infobox-data" {{!}} {{{abilities|}}}
}}
{{#if:{{{affiliations|}}}|
{{!}}-
{{!}} class="infobox-label" {{!}} Affiliations
{{!}} class="infobox-data" {{!}} {{{affiliations|}}}
}}
{{#if:{{{professions|}}}|
{{!}}-
{{!}} class="infobox-label" {{!}} Professions
{{!}} class="infobox-data" {{!}} {{{professions|}}}
}}
{{#if:{{{appears_in|}}}|
{{!}}-
{{!}} class="infobox-label" {{!}} Appears in
{{!}} class="infobox-data" {{!}} {{{appears_in|}}}
}}
|-
| class="infobox-label" | Introduced
| class="infobox-data" | {{{introduced}}}
|}<noinclude>Character infobox (generated by mediawiki/gen_infobox_templates.py; styling in [[MediaWiki:Common.css]]).</noinclude>
